slc_intro: First measure whether the lag is on the server (A) or your phone's screen (B), then honestly handle the client half. It does not intercept fetch, touch chat rendering, or fix the server — the frontend physically can't.
slc_gauge_note: Off by default; samples for 10 seconds when pressed — scroll the chat normally. Measures only this phone (B), not the server (A).
slc_nudge_enabled: Suggest starting a new chat when it gets long
slc_ops_title: 🛠️ Lag remedies: first figure out which kind of lag
slc_ops_lead: "Just install cocktail-plus and it won't lag" is a myth — it speeds startup but does not cure "gets laggier the longer you use it". Use the meter above to tell them apart, then treat the right one:
slc_ops_h1: 1. Gets laggier over time (the most common complaint)
slc_ops_lead1: cocktail-plus can't fix this kind. First measure A vs B:
slc_ops_a: A - Server memory (long generation waits, everyone lags together, recurs after clearing cache): set a Pod memory limit so OOMKill auto-restarts, or schedule restarts. The frontend can't fix this.
slc_ops_b: B - Phone rendering (dropped frames, won't scroll): lower "messages to load" to 100 (one-click above), start a new chat, reload the tab; install BaiBai-Tools for content-visibility.
slc_ops_h2: 2. Slow to open / stuck on the gear (cold start)
slc_ops_c: cocktail-plus (frontend + backend) is where it actually helps: backend cache, early bridge, save patching, parallel extension activation. Needs enableServerPlugins: true in config.yaml + copying the backend (plan section 4).
slc_ops_d: config.yaml: lazyLoadCharacters, requestCompression, memoryCacheCapacity: 50mb, disable enableServerPluginsAutoUpdate.
slc_ops_e: Disk cleanup: clear character cache, prune overflow backups, shallow-clone extension .git histories.
slc_ops_foot: This extension measures and one-click-fixes the client half (B); the server side (reading /proc, clearing disk, restarting) is out of the frontend's reach and is honestly pointed back to ops. See the Cloud Tavern Optimization Plan for details.
